name: Appointments: Booking Link

description.en: Get the public booking link for your appointment page. Share this link so people can book appointments with you directly.
description.de: Rufe den öffentlichen Buchungslink deiner Terminseite ab. Teile diesen Link, damit Leute direkt bei dir Termine buchen können.
description.es: Obtiene el enlace público de tu página de reservas. Comparte este enlace para que la gente pueda reservar citas directamente contigo.
description.fr: Récupère le lien public de votre page de réservation. Partagez ce lien pour que les gens puissent prendre rendez-vous directement avec vous.
description.ro: Obține linkul public al paginii tale de programări. Trimite acest link pentru ca oamenii să poată rezerva direct cu tine.
description.it: Get the public booking link for your appointment page. Share this link so people can book appointments with you directly.

bot: Use this when the user asks for their booking link, appointment link, booking page URL, or how others can book appointments with them. Also use when they want to share or send their appointment scheduling page.

vars.JOAI_SITE_BASE: env:JOAI_SITE_BASE|Base URL of the JoAi sites service

success.en: Here's your appointment booking link — share it so people can book with you: {{JOAI_SITE_BASE}}/{{JOAI_TEAM_SLUG}}/appointment/
success.de: Hier ist dein Buchungslink — teile ihn, damit Leute bei dir buchen können: {{JOAI_SITE_BASE}}/{{JOAI_TEAM_SLUG}}/appointment/
success.es: Aquí está tu enlace de reserva — compártelo para que la gente pueda reservar contigo: {{JOAI_SITE_BASE}}/{{JOAI_TEAM_SLUG}}/appointment/
success.fr: Voici votre lien de réservation — partagez-le pour que les gens puissent prendre rendez-vous avec vous: {{JOAI_SITE_BASE}}/{{JOAI_TEAM_SLUG}}/appointment/
success.ro: Acesta este linkul tău de programări — trimite-l pentru ca oamenii să poată rezerva cu tine: {{JOAI_SITE_BASE}}/{{JOAI_TEAM_SLUG}}/appointment/
success.it: Here's your appointment booking link — share it so people can book with you: {{JOAI_SITE_BASE}}/{{JOAI_TEAM_SLUG}}/appointment/
